nasb.text: Do not complain, brethren, against one another, so that you yourselves may not be judged; behold, the Judge is standing right at the door.

esv.text: Do not grumble against one another, brothers, so that you may not be judged; behold, the Judge is standing at the door.

cnv.text: 弟兄們，不要彼此抱怨，免得你們受審判。看哪，審判的主已經站在門前了。

ccb.text: 弟兄姊妹，不要互相埋怨，免得受审判。你们看，审判的主已经站在门外了。

csbs.text: 弟兄们，不要彼此埋怨，免得你们受审判。看哪，审判者已经站在门口了！
